revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Prominent_candidate_Ishigami_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25185113590|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Prominent_candidate_Ishigami_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25185113590|time triggered pipeline]] -->

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Prominent candidate Ishigami Shrine
| native_name = （有力）石神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Prominent candidate Ishigami Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|38.523036|141.501455}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Prominent candidate Ishigami Shrine'''|（有力）石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182093</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062|1=Engishiki seat}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182093</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1552

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province|ja|陸奥国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 56
** P155: {{ill|Futamatano Shrine|lt=Futamatano Shrine|WD=Q135040012|1=Futamatano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Kesemaohoshimano Shrine|lt=Kesemaohoshimano Shrine|WD=Q135040014|1=Kesemaohoshimano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Mutsu Province|lt=Mutsu Province|ca|Província de Mutsu|cs|Provincie Mucu|de|Provinz Mutsu|en|Mutsu Province|es|Provincia de Mutsu|fa|ولایت موتسو|fi|Mutsun provinssi|fr|Province de Mutsu|gl|Provincia de Mutsu|id|Provinsi Mutsu|it|Mutsu (provincia)|ja|陸奥国|ko|무쓰국|lt|Mucu žemė|nl|Mutsu (provincie)|pt|Província de Mutsu|ru|Муцу (провинция)|simple|Mutsu Province|sk|Mucu (provincia)|sr|Провинција Муцу|tr|Mutsu (vilayet)|uk|Муцу (провінція)|zh-classical|陸奧國|zh_min_nan|Mutu-kok|zh_yue|陸奧國|zh|陸奧國|WD=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}}
* {{ill|Monou District, Miyagi|lt=Monou district|en|Monou District, Miyagi|ja|桃生郡|ko|모노군 (미야기현)|sr|Област Моноу|WD=Q6902060|1=Monou District, Miyagi}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|38.523036|141.501455}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182093</ref>

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182093
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Ishikamino Shrine|lt=Ishikamino Shrine|WD=Q135040013|1=Ishikamino Shrine}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182093</ref>
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
